ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "functional_role" TEXT /* Functional role of the area (e.g., production, storage, maintenance) */,
  "area_category" TEXT /* Category of the area (e.g., production, storage, maintenance) */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent area */,
  "area_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_functional_role FOREIGN KEY ("functional_role") REFERENCES condition_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., safety, environmental, operational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., safety, environmental, operational) */,
  "condition_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the condition */,
  "condition_description_template" TEXT /* Template for condition descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES condition_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the condition type */,
  "type_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the condition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the target is associated with */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target value for the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "target_category" TEXT /* Category of the target (e.g., safety, environmental, operational) */,
  "target_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the target */,
  "target_description_template" TEXT /* Template for target descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_conditions" (
  "area_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area-condition relationship */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition in the area (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the condition was last checked */,
  "area_condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the area condition (e.g., safety, environmental, operational) */,
  "area_condition_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the area condition */,
  "area_condition_status_history" TEXT /* History of status changes for the area condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_conditions_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition change */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., improvement, deterioration) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change occurred */,
  "change_category" TEXT /* Category of the condition change (e.g., safety, environmental, operational) */,
  "change_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the condition change */,
  "change_description_template" TEXT /* Template for condition change descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_changes_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_changes_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "background_changes" (
  "bg_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each background change */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the background change (e.g., policy update, regulation change) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the background change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the background change occurred */,
  "bg_change_category" TEXT /* Category of the background change (e.g., policy update, regulation change) */,
  "bg_change_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the background change */,
  "bg_change_description_template" TEXT /* Template for background change descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the background change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the background change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bg_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_background_changes_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title or position of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department_head" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area accessed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition accessed */,
  "access_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the access type (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "access_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the access attempt */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_background_changes" (
  "area_bg_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area-background change relationship */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "bg_change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the background change */,
  "area_bg_change_category" TEXT /* Category of the area background change (e.g., policy update, regulation change) */,
  "area_bg_change_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the area background change */,
  "area_bg_change_description_template" TEXT /* Template for area background change descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_bg_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_background_changes_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_background_changes_bg_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("bg_change_id") REFERENCES background_changes ("bg_change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_condition_changes" (
  "area_condition_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area-condition change relationship */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition change */,
  "area_condition_change_category" TEXT /* Category of the area condition change (e.g., improvement, deterioration) */,
  "area_condition_change_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the area condition change */,
  "area_condition_change_description_template" TEXT /* Template for area condition change descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_condition_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_condition_changes_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_condition_changes_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_condition_changes_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES condition_changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_targets" (
  "area_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area-target relationship */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the target in the area (e.g., achieved, not achieved) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the target was last checked */,
  "area_target_category" TEXT /* Category of the area target (e.g., safety, environmental, operational) */,
  "area_target_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the area target */,
  "area_target_description_template" TEXT /* Template for area target descriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_targets_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)
